signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & 148M Daily Non-Vote Tx; Alpenglow Upgrade Announced | YES | MED confiden
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders & 148M Daily Non-Vote Tx; Alpenglow Upgrade Announced | YES | MED confidence**  
As of April 14, Solana achieved all-time highs in network activity, boosted by the Alpenglow consensus upgrade slashing transaction finality to 150ms from 12s, contributing to its price surge amid April bullish momentum.[3]
matched_markets: Will the price of Solana be above $90 on April 28?

signals.headline: Iran Signals Intent to Resume Peace Talks with US Before April 22 Ceasefire Expiry | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Signals Intent to Resume Peace Talks with US Before April 22 Ceasefire Expiry | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Iran has signaled willingness to return to negotiations with the US, with discussions underway for new talks before the ceasefire expires on April 22, easing Middle East tensions and reducing the expected impact of Trump's Hormuz blockade; this triggered Bitcoin to hit $75,000 (up 5.9%),
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?

signals.headline: Bitcoin Consolidates Near $76K on ETF Inflows & Whale Accumulation Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH confid
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Consolidates Near $76K on ETF Inflows & Whale Accumulation Amid Easing Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin holds firm near $76,000 (recent high $78,000) with strong buying interest, $1.1B inflows, and rebounds from dips, as Solana rises 4.18% to ~$83 (Rs 8320).[5]
